titleStmt.title: SII 26.530: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 530. (A.R. No. 502 of 1909.) ŚŌḺAPURAM, SIVAGANGA TALUK, RAMANATHAPURAM DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription is built in at one end.

It records a gift by the king of land as tiruviḍaiyāṭṭa iṟaiyili to the image of the god Maṉṉār set up by Nāchchiyār in the temple of the god Uttamaśōḻaviṇṇagar [Āḻvār] of Śōḻapuram in Āṇmā-ṉāḍu, to provide for daily worship and offerings to the same. The extent of the land was one vēli. This order of the king was sent to the Nambimār and Śrīvaishṇavas of the temple.

The signatories included, Aḻagaṉ Śokkaṉ of Oḷagaḷandaśōḻanallūr in Muttūṟṟuk-kūṟṟam, Dāmōdiraṉ Tuppaṉ alias Kulaśekaravi[••• ••• ••••], Dēvachchilai alias Mīṉavaṉ Viḷupparaiyaṉ of a place (name lost) in Rāśēndiraśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu, Uyyavandāṉ Uyyan iḍuvāṉ Kurukula [•••••] of Kīraṉūr in [••• •••]mbi-nāḍu, Yōgapperumāṉ Śokkaṉār alias (name lost) of a certain nallūr (name lost) in Naḍuvilkkūṟṟu in Miḻalaik-kūṟṟam and [•••••] yoṉ Kaliyaṉ alias Kaliṅgaraiyaṉ of a place (name lost) in Kīḻchchembi-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
cceyal Āṇmāṉāṭṭu coḻapurattu Uttamacoḻaviṇṇakar
koyil nampimārkkum śrīvaiṣṇavarkaḷukkum Ikkoyilili
ḷuvitta maṉṉaṉārkkum nācciyār śrīkomāṟapaṉmā
ṉaccakravattikaḷ Emmaṇṭalamuṅ koṇṭaruḷiya śrīkula
kku yāṇṭu 2 10 5 vatu cittirai māsam mutal Amutupaṭi cā
ḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum nitta nimantaṅkaḷukku Ivvūr nam Uḻavā
ṅkalattil Ivarkku tiruviṭaiyāṭṭa Iṟaiyiliyākak kuṭu
ṭikkolāl naṭuvil koṭṭakārattukkut teṟku veṇ
Ikkoṭṭakārattukku meṟkkuc cumatāṅkik kiṇaṟu
kkiṇaṟu Iraṇṭu Uṭpaṭṭa nilam Oru veli nilam Oru veli
ṭu muṭaiya yile kārāṇmai Uṭalāka taṉmatāṉ
kak kuṭuttom Ippaṭi Ivvolai piṭipāṭākak koṇṭu
kalluvitāka nāṉkellaiyilum tiruvāḻikkallum nāṭṭi
mpilum veṭṭikkoḷka Ippaṭikku Ivai muttūṟṟukkūṟṟa
nāṉa Oḷakaḷantacoḻanallūr Aḻakaṉ cokkaṉār Eḻuttu I�
nācciyār ttu tāmotiraṉ tuppaṉāṉa kulacekaravi
ḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai rācentiracoḻavaḷanāṭṭu tāraṅku�
lamutu tevaccilaiyāṉāṉa miṉavaṉ viḻuppareyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippa
mpiṉāṭṭu kiraṉūraṉ Uyyavantāṉ Uyyan Iṭuvāṉ kurukula
ḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai miḻalaik kūṟṟattu naṭuvilk kūṟṟu vi
llūr Uṭaiyāṉ yokapperumāṉ cokkaṉārāṉa
ṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kiḻccempināṭṭu ta
yaṉ kaliyaṉāṉa kaliṅkaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 26.530 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
